query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `narrative_versions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `claim_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assessment_id` int NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_index` int NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `version` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `base_narrative` text NOT NULL,
  `enriched_narrative` text,
  `external_narrative` text,
  `preserves_meaning` tinyint,
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_nv_claim` (`claim_id`),
  KEY `idx_nv_assessment` (`assessment_id`),
  KEY `idx_nv_type` (`mismatch_type`),
  KEY `idx_nv_active` (`is_active`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `narrative_versions` (

  `mismatch_index` int NOT NULL,
  `mismatch_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,

  `base_narrative` text NOT NULL,
  `enriched_narrative` text,
  `external_narrative` text,
  `preserves_meaning` tinyint,
  `source` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `created_by` int,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_nv_claim` (`claim_id`),
  KEY `idx_nv_assessment` (`assessment_id`),
  KEY `idx_nv_type` (`mismatch_type`),
  KEY `idx_nv_active` (`is_active`)
);
